'''Grrtok''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] who was the leader of a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] group called [[Grrtok's Band]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Grrtok was a warrior well past his prime, but still a formidable combatant by other species' standards. By the low standards of Gamorrean society, he was considered to be educated, and was a brilliant tactician who was well respected by the [[Soldier/Legends|warriors]] that he led.

Grrtok's Band consisted of a collection of about 400 heavily-armed Gamorreans. Grrtok traveled [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] looking for other Gamorreans to join his group and in some cases freed them from [[Slavery/Legends|slavers]]. Grrtok ran the mercenary group much like the familial clans of the Gamorrean [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Gamorr/Legends|Gamorr]]. His group was contracted out to [[House Barnaba]] of the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]].
